text: HbA1c 8.2% and glucose 186 mg/dL were documented. TSH 6.1 mIU/L and cortisol 4.8 mcg/dL were reported. The insulin regimen was glargine 24 units qHS. Metabolic syndrome and thyroid enlargement were noted. This synthetic fixture is descriptive only and does not infer insulin dosing or glycemic-control targets.
